title: polypodium tenuissimum
intro: Polypodium tenuissimum, also known as Black Hay-scented Fern, is a type of flowering plant in the Polypodiaceae family, which is native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polypodium tenuissimum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
